draft:
Dear Officer:

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation of Mr. Rajiv Mehra in support of his O-1 visa petition. Mr. Mehra is an extraordinary entrepreneur and product manager in the field of AI music technology and multisensory user experiences. His groundbreaking work in these domains has earned him a reputation as a leading innovator and visionary, whose contributions have had a significant impact on the industry.

As an AR Experience Prototyper in the Vision Products Group at Pear Inc., I have extensive experience in defining and refining user experiences for emerging technologies. I build prototypes to test theories and collaborate with hardware teams to turn these into real products that ship. My role involves working on cutting-edge augmented reality (AR) projects and pushing the boundaries of what is possible in this field.

Prior to joining Pear Inc., I held several key roles at other leading technology companies. At Transition Corp (formerly ConnectBook), I served as a Senior Audio Experience Prototyper in the Reality Initiative Research division. There, I worked on prototyping audio experiences for AR and VR, helping to transform research into actual products. My work involved collaborating with cross-functional teams to develop innovative solutions that enhance the user experience in immersive environments.

Before my tenure at Transition Corp, I was an Interaction Designer at OptiGaze, where I focused on designing and implementing new eye-tracking interactions for AR/VR headsets. My contributions included adding features to the Unity SDK and creating tech demos to promote the adoption of eye-tracking technology. This experience allowed me to hone my skills in user experience design and human-computer interaction, which are critical to my current role at Pear Inc.

Earlier in my career, I worked at MicroWare in various capacities. As a Hardware Prototyper, I built rapid prototypes to test new ideas and concepts. In my role as a VisiLens Audio Experience Prototyper, I developed the first Spatial Sound engine for VisiLens and contributed to MicroWare's Spatial Sound plugins for Unity and Wwise. These experiences provided me with a strong foundation in both hardware and software development, as well as a deep understanding of spatial computing.

My educational background includes a Master of Fine Arts (MFA) in Theatre/Theater (Sound Design) from UC Los Angeles and a Bachelor of Science (BS) in Computer Science with minors in Theatre Technology & Design and Physics from Carleton University. This interdisciplinary education has equipped me with a unique blend of technical and creative skills that I leverage in my work as an AR Experience Prototyper.

Throughout my career, I have developed a wide range of technical and creative skills, including user experience (UX) design, human-computer interaction, sound design, and programming in various languages such as C++, Java, and JavaScript. I am also proficient in tools and frameworks like Unity, MaxMSP, Pure Data, and FMOD. These skills, combined with my extensive experience in leading-edge technology companies, have enabled me to contribute to the development of pioneering technology solutions and to mentor others in the field.

I had the privilege of working closely with Mr. Mehra during our time together at OptiGaze, a leading eye-tracking technology company. As a UX Designer at OptiGaze from August 2017 to December 2019, Mr. Mehra played a pivotal role in designing and implementing innovative eye-tracking interactions for AR/VR platforms. His work was instrumental in advancing OptiGaze's technology and positioning the company as a leader in the field.

During his tenure at OptiGaze, Mr. Mehra focused on designing eye-tracking-based interactions for dual-display devices like the Intel Starburst and Acer StreamBoard. His work in this area was groundbreaking, as he developed intuitive and user-friendly interfaces that enhanced the usability and functionality of these devices. By leveraging eye-tracking technology, he was able to create seamless and natural interactions that significantly improved the user experience.

In addition to his work on dual-display devices, Mr. Mehra also conducted extensive research on eye-tracking-based AR interactions. He identified numerous opportunities to integrate eye-tracking technology into AR applications and developed prototypes to demonstrate their potential. His innovative ideas and designs led to the filing of four patents, underscoring his contributions to the field and his commitment to pushing the boundaries of what is possible with eye-tracking technology.

Mr. Mehra's expertise extended to designing eye-tracking interactions for smartphones as well. He conducted thorough research, conceptualized new interaction paradigms, and designed intuitive interfaces that leveraged eye-tracking to enhance the user experience on mobile devices. His work in this area demonstrated his versatility and ability to apply his skills across different platforms and devices.

Furthermore, Mr. Mehra explored the potential of eye-tracking technology in the realm of voice assistants. He identified opportunities to create visually aware voice assistants that could leverage eye-tracking data to provide more contextually relevant and personalized interactions. His designs and prototypes showcased the potential of combining eye-tracking with voice technology to create more intelligent and responsive digital assistants.

Throughout his time at OptiGaze, Mr. Mehra consistently demonstrated a high level of creativity, technical expertise, and a strong commitment to innovation. His ability to think outside the box and develop groundbreaking solutions was truly impressive. His contributions were recognized by the company, as he was awarded the title of "Top Innovator" for Q1 2019.

Mr. Mehra's work at OptiGaze not only advanced the company's technology but also had a significant impact on the broader field of eye-tracking and AR/VR interactions. His innovative designs and prototypes have paved the way for new applications and use cases, and his patents stand as a testament to his contributions to the industry.

Beyond his technical skills and innovative mindset, Mr. Mehra also demonstrated excellent collaboration and communication abilities. He worked effectively with cross-functional teams, including engineers, researchers, and product managers, to bring his ideas to life. His ability to articulate complex concepts and present his work to both technical and non-technical audiences was a key factor in his success at OptiGaze.

Since his time at OptiGaze, Mr. Mehra has continued to build on his impressive track record of innovation and leadership. He went on to work at Streamify, where he served as a Product Manager from January 2020 to May 2023. In this role, he led the product strategy, roadmap, vision, and execution within Streamify's music creation business unit, SoundChain. His work involved collaborating with a cross-functional team of engineers, designers, researchers, and data scientists to build cutting-edge music creation experiences.

One of Mr. Mehra's notable achievements at Streamify was transforming SoundChain into a real-time collaboration app, which led to a fourfold increase in studio collaboration time. He also developed a product strategy to enhance communication among Gen Z users by building a "Chat Threads" feature. This initiative resulted in a 40% increase in user interactions with communication features, including video and chat, and garnered significant media attention, reaching 110 million impressions.

Mr. Mehra's tenure at Streamify further solidified his reputation as a visionary product leader who excels at driving innovation and delivering impactful solutions. His ability to lead cross-functional teams and develop user-centric products has been a consistent theme throughout his career.

Currently, Mr. Mehra is the Founder and CEO of Sonic AI, a company he established in June 2023. Sonic AI is a state-of-the-art AI content creation platform that enables users to create music and podcasts with ease. The platform leverages generative AI to help users brainstorm and translate their stories into musical realities. Sonic AI has already garnered significant attention, with over 1 million songs generated by more than 800,000 creators.

Under Mr. Mehra's leadership, Sonic AI has been recognized in various media outlets, including Business Leaders Today, Audio Ally, and The Urban Daily. The company's mission to democratize music creation and empower aspiring creators aligns perfectly with Mr. Mehra's passion for innovation and user-centric design.

Mr. Mehra's journey from OptiGaze to Streamify and now to Sonic AI exemplifies his unwavering commitment to pushing the boundaries of technology and creating meaningful user experiences. His ability to envision the future, build and motivate teams, and turn innovative ideas into tangible, market-leading products is truly remarkable.

In conclusion, Mr. Rajiv Mehra is an extraordinary entrepreneur and product manager whose contributions to the fields of AI music technology and multisensory user experiences have been nothing short of remarkable. His track record of innovation, leadership, and impact across multiple high-profile companies speaks volumes about his capabilities and potential.

I am confident that Mr. Mehra will continue to make significant contributions to the industry and drive meaningful advancements in technology and user experience. His unique blend of technical expertise, creative vision, and leadership acumen make him an invaluable asset to any organization or project he undertakes.

I wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Rajiv Mehra for the O-1 visa, as his extraordinary abilities and achievements clearly meet the criteria for this classification. His presence in the United States will undoubtedly benefit the tech industry and contribute to the development of cutting-edge solutions that will shape the future.

Thank you for considering my recommendation. Please feel free to contact me if you require any further information or clarification regarding Mr. Mehra's qualifications and contributions.

Sincerely,

Adrian McPherson
AR Experience Prototyper
Pear Inc.
adrian.mcpherson@gmail.com

Dear USCIS Officer: 

It is my pleasure to wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Mehra as an extraordinary entrepreneur and product manager in the field of AI music technology and multisensory user experiences. Mr Mehra's groundbreaking work in these domains has earned him a reputation as a leading innovator and visionary, whose contributions have had a significant impact on the industry.

Since his time at OptiGaze, Mr. Mehra has continued to build on his impressive track record of innovation and leadership. One of Mr. Mehra's notable achievements at Streamify was transforming SoundChain into a real-time collaboration app, which led to a significant increase in studio collaboration time. This initiative resulted in a 40% increase in user interactions with communication features, including video and chat, and garnered significant media attention, reaching 110 million impressions.

Mr. Mehra's tenure at Streamify further solidified his reputation as a visionary product leader who excels at driving innovation and delivering impactful solutions. His ability to lead cross-functional teams and develop user-centric products has been a consistent theme throughout his career.

Currently, Mr. Mehra is the Founder and CEO of Sonic AI, a groundbreaking venture he launched in June 2023. Sonic AI is at the forefront of AI-driven content creation, offering a platform that revolutionizes how music and podcasts are crafted. By harnessing the power of generative AI, Sonic AI empowers users to effortlessly convert their ideas and narratives into musical realities, thereby breaking down traditional barriers in music creation.

What sets Sonic AI apart is Mr. Mehra’s novel contributions to the integration of AI technology with multisensory user experiences. He has meticulously designed the platform to not only generate high-quality audio content but also enhance the creative process through intuitive user interactions. This innovation has allowed over 800,000 creators to generate more than 1 million songs, showcasing the platform's scalability and appeal to a broad audience.

Under Mr. Mehra's visionary leadership, Sonic AI has earned media recognition from outlets such as Business Leaders Today, Audio Ally, and The Urban Daily. The platform’s mission to democratize music creation and empower creators aligns seamlessly with Mr. Mehra's commitment to pioneering user-centric design and technological advancement. His work exemplifies how cutting-edge AI can intersect with creative expression to unlock new possibilities in digital content creation. I am excited to see what further advancements Mr. Mehra spearheads through Sonic AI, as his innovative approach continues to shape the future of AI music technology and multisensory user experiences.

To summarize, Mr. Mehra's remarkable journey in advancing AI music technology and pioneering multisensory user experiences is a testament to his extraordinary talent as an entrepreneur and product manager. His leadership and innovation at Sonic AI exemplify his unique ability to seamlessly integrate cutting-edge technology with creative expression, driving transformative changes in digital content creation. I am confident that Mr. Mehra's continued contributions will not only enhance the landscape of AI and user experiences but also inspire new generations of innovators in the field. His remarkable capabilities make him an invaluable asset, and I strongly recommend approval of his visa petition to support his endeavors in advancing technological innovation and creative possibilities.

Thank you for considering my recommendation. Please feel free to contact me if you require any further information or clarification regarding my analysis of Mr. Mehra's qualifications and contributions.

Yours truly,

Adrian McPherson
AR Experience Prototyper
Pear Inc.
[insert contact information]
